THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MACHI, TONY J.F. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LAM, GLORIA $803.35 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $943.35, PRINCIPAL IS TOTAL SECURITY DEPOSIT WITH INTEREST LESS RENT BOARD FEE ($1,023.35) LESS CLEANING FEE UNDER CIVIL CODE 1950.5(B)(3); CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANT TONY J.F. MACHI AND AGAINST GLORIA LAM IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00. TOTAL JUDGMENT FOR CROSS-CLAIM IS $0.00. RESPONDENT DID NOT SHOW DAMAGE TO FLOORS WAS CAUSED BY APPELLANT OR BEYOND USUAL WEAR AND TEAR. THE JUDGEMNT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT ON JUL-31-2013. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent Gloria Lam appearing in pro per. Appellant Tony J.F. Machi appears in pro per with witness Jill Vianco. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles.
